---
title: "CDADE Literature Review"
author: "CDADE Team"
date: "2026-07-05"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Literature Review

## Scope

This stub captures the planned literature review and proposed modification for CDADE.

## Planned evidence

- Metrics summary: results/stats/summary.csv
- Ablation summary: results/ablation/summary.csv

## Next steps

- Add a concise review of reconciliation and selection literature.
- Link each cited method to its current ablation and statistical outcome.
